modes.name: Cross-mode (applies to both casual and ranked)

criteria.description: A host can create a room; room code + player info returned.
testRefs: src/services/__tests__/api.test.ts > roomApi > createRoom > sends correct payload and returns room code + player info

criteria.description: A second player can join; lobby state syncs for both.
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/create-join-start.spec.ts > both players see correct lobby state after join

criteria.description: Host starts the game; both players see the game board.
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/create-join-start.spec.ts > host starts game and both players see game board

criteria.description: Producers submit tiles (audio) for assigned genres.
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > should handle tile submission for random genres
src/services/__tests__/api.test.ts > gameApi > submitTile > sends FormData with audio_file and player_id

criteria.description: Rounds advance to bingo (win condition reached).
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > should play full casual game to bingo
tests/e2e/live/ranked-full-game.spec.ts > should play full ranked game with voting to bingo

criteria.description: A player reloading mid-game restores their board/state via rejoin.
testRefs: tests/e2e/rejoin-recovery.spec.ts > restores a producer board through rejoin_game after reload
tests/e2e/rejoin-recovery.spec.ts > restores a spectator dashboard through rejoin_game after reload
tests/e2e/live/create-join-start.spec.ts > host status is restored after page refresh via rejoin flow

criteria.description: When the host disconnects, a migration indicator appears and control transfers.
testRefs: tests/e2e/host-migration.spec.ts > host migration indicator appears when host disconnects

criteria.description: Winner declared by most lines; efficiency + simultaneous-completion tie-breakers handled and explained.
testRefs: tests/e2e/tie-breaking.spec.ts > should declare player with most lines as winner
tests/e2e/tie-breaking.spec.ts > should use efficiency tie-breaker when lines are equal
tests/e2e/tie-breaking.spec.ts > should handle simultaneous completion tie-breaker
tests/e2e/tie-breaking.spec.ts > should show tie-breaker explanation in victory display

criteria.description: Score display shows base (100/line), multi-line bonus, speed bonus, combined bonuses, completed-lines viz.
testRefs: tests/e2e/score-display.spec.ts > should show base score calculation (100 points per line)
tests/e2e/score-display.spec.ts > should show multi-line bonus in ScoreDisplay
tests/e2e/score-display.spec.ts > should show speed bonus when completing quickly
tests/e2e/score-display.spec.ts > should show combined bonuses together
tests/e2e/score-display.spec.ts > should show completed lines visualization

criteria.description: Player secret is never exposed in console logs.
testRefs: tests/e2e/pii-prevention.spec.ts > should not expose playerSecret in console logs

criteria.description: Room share button is visible and clickable with correct behavior.
testRefs: tests/e2e/share-invite.spec.ts > share button is visible in room page
tests/e2e/share-invite.spec.ts > share button is clickable and has correct behavior
tests/e2e/integration-verification.spec.ts > lobby shell loads with title and room code input
tests/e2e/integration-verification.spec.ts > room page renders with mocked state
tests/e2e/integration-verification.spec.ts > leaderboard page loads
tests/e2e/integration-verification.spec.ts > admin page shows PIN input
tests/e2e/integration-verification.spec.ts > 404 navigation shows NotFound page

criteria.description: A full casual game plays through rounds to bingo without voting.
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > should play full casual game to bingo
tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > should handle tile submission for random genres

criteria.description: Casual rounds end on time-up with no spectator voting (per GameInfo.tsx spectator-count check, backend views.py:1163 gates voting on MIN_SPECTATORS_FOR_RANKED).
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > casual round ends on time-up with no spectator voting

criteria.description: Casual results do not affect ELO / ranked leaderboard (views.py:1262/1363 gates ranked resolution on MIN_SPECTATORS_FOR_RANKED).
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/casual-full-game.spec.ts > casual results do not affect ELO or ranked leaderboard

criteria.description: A full ranked game plays through rounds with spectator voting to bingo.
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/ranked-full-game.spec.ts > should play full ranked game with voting to bingo
tests/e2e/live/ranked-full-game.spec.ts > should handle voting phase in ranked mode

criteria.description: Voting requires >=3 spectators (per MIN_SPECTATORS_FOR_RANKED in src/types/game.ts, backend views.py:1163 / 1472).
testRefs: tests/e2e/live/ranked-full-game.spec.ts > enforces >=3 spectator gate for ranked voting

criteria.description: ELO updates on win/loss, persists across games, does not affect spectators.
testRefs: tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should display ELO rating
tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should show winner gains ELO
tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should show loser loses ELO
tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should show ELO stats in final standings
tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should not affect spectator ELO
tests/e2e/elo-rating.spec.ts > should persist ELO across games

criteria.description: Ranked players render on the leaderboard; profile modal + genre radar chart work.
testRefs: tests/e2e/leaderboard-profile.spec.ts > leaderboard page renders ranked players
tests/e2e/leaderboard-profile.spec.ts > clicking player opens profile modal
tests/e2e/genre-heatmap-leaderboard.spec.ts > opens leaderboard from lobby and renders players sorted by ELO with genre summary
tests/e2e/genre-heatmap-leaderboard.spec.ts > renders the radar chart in the player profile modal
tests/e2e/titles.spec.ts > ranked title and ELO results render in match surfaces
